metadata.feature_description: Integrated IFC validation framework where validation rules (IfcValidation) and grouping schemas (IfcValidationSchema) are first-class graph citizens stored in ifc_entity. Supports attribute checks, inheritance-aware validation, and subgraph/relationship-scoped validation via Apache AGE Cypher traversals. Includes a Schema Browser UI popup and MCP tool stubs for agentic workflows.

state.current_objective: All 11 steps implemented, tested, and verified.

execution_log.step: Read PRD, overview.md, existing features for context
Analyzed existing database schema, validation_rule table, age_client patterns
Step 1: DB migration - AGE labels and partial index
Step 2: Validation entity CRUD in db.py (6 functions)
Step 3: Graph edge operations in age_client.py (5 functions)
Step 4: Cypher subgraph validation queries (6 templates + 3 client functions)
Step 5: Validation engine service (operators, rule evaluator, run_validation)
Step 6: GraphQL types (10 types + 2 inputs) and resolvers (4 queries + 9 mutations)
Step 8: Frontend Schema Browser popup (page + layout + CSS)
Step 9: Frontend state & API integration (GraphQL queries/mutations, BroadcastChannel)
Step 10: Backend tests (23 tests - CRUD, operators, engine, GraphQL)
Step 11: Verification - 187 tests pass, lint clean, manual GraphQL testing
